clearCameraSettings: Clear saved camera settings from memory
exposureControl: Choose between automatic or manual exposure control
framerateControl: Choose between automatic or manual framerate control
setTargetFps: Set target frames per second (FPS) for camera capture
playbackSpeed: Playback speed (does not affect recording fps)
loadSynchronizedVideosDescription: This page will allow you to load and synchronize pre-recorded videos.
videoPlaybackError: Video format not supported by this player
syncInfoTitle: Recording playback may show desynchronization not present in the recorded videos. Matched frame numbers represent images from the same time slice.  We are working on a fix.
syncInfoBody: Browser video playback does not guarantee sample-accurate synchronization across multiple streams. The player uses a leader-follower strategy and corrects drift when it exceeds a small tolerance, but minor desynchronization (1–2 frames) can occur
estimatedFromFrameNumber: Estimated from frame number × recording fps — not read from timestamp data
name: Name
showTranslationIndicatorDescription: Display a badge when using AI-generated translations
displayTooltipLong: Display represents the UI rendering performance. It shows how quickly your display receives and renders frames. Performance issues here won't affect recording quality but may impact your ability to monitor cameras in real-time.
statsSourceShort: Display renders frames, Server captures frames.
statsSourceLong: The server is the true rate at which frames are pulled/recorded from the camera, while display is the rate at which they are received and rendered. FreeMoCap prioritizes server-side performance for recording quality, so that number should stay more stable. If the display framerate diverges from the server, it indicates your system resources are taxed. Consider using fewer cameras or decreasing framerate/resolution.
statsCurrentShort: Most recent frame time and corresponding FPS.
statsCurrentLong: This shows the most recent measurement of how long it takes to process a single frame (in milliseconds) and the equivalent frames per second (FPS). Lower frame times and higher FPS indicate better performance.
statsMinShort: Fastest frame time (lowest latency) and highest FPS achieved.
statsMinLong: This represents the minimum time it took to process a single frame during the sampling window. This corresponds to the maximum FPS your system achieved during optimal conditions.
statsMaxShort: Slowest frame time (highest latency) and lowest FPS experienced.
statsMaxLong: This represents the maximum time it took to process a single frame during the sampling window. This corresponds to the minimum FPS your system achieved during worst-case conditions. Occasional spikes are normal, but consistently high values may indicate performance issues.
statsMeanShort: Average frame time and FPS across all samples.
statsMeanLong: The arithmetic mean (average) of all frame times measured during the sampling window and the corresponding FPS. This gives a good overall picture of performance but may be skewed by outliers.
statsMedianShort: Middle value of all frame times (50th percentile).
statsMedianLong: The median represents the middle value when all frame times are sorted from fastest to slowest. Unlike the mean, the median is not affected by extreme outliers, making it a more stable indicator of typical performance.
statsStdDevShort: Measures frame time variability. CV% is relative variability.
statsStdDevLong: Standard deviation measures the amount of variation in frame times. Lower values indicate more consistent performance. The Coefficient of Variation (CV%) expresses this variability as a percentage of the mean, making it easier to compare stability across different frame rates. Lower CV% indicates more stable performance.
aiTranslatedTooltip: This translation was generated by AI and may contain errors. If you speak this language, you can help improve it by opening a pull request on GitHub!
humanValidatedTooltip: This translation has been reviewed and validated by a human translator.
noRecordingsFound: No recordings found. Enter a path above to load manually.
clickRefreshToScan: Click refresh to scan for available cameras
pipelineStages_filterCaptureLong: Stages from camera nodes: grab, rotate, JPEG, and capture-side detection.
pipelineStages_filterTrackingLong: Skeleton and board tracking (per-camera and inference nodes).
pipelineStages_filterAggregationLong: Aggregator triangulation, filtering, and end-to-end frame processing.
pipelineStages_filterUiBackendLong: Server-side preview path: resize, rotate, JPEG encode, and WebSocket payload prep.
pipelineStages_filterUiFrontendLong: Browser-side: JPEG decode, main-thread dispatch, canvas worker, and paint.
pipelineStages_sourceLong: Identifier for a stage or span (e.g. camera node, inference, or UI timing row). Click the header to sort alphabetically by display name.
pipelineStages_sourceTextFilterAria: Filter pipeline stage rows by text
pipelineStages_col_recentShort: Latest sample for this row (ms or FPS).
pipelineStages_col_recentLong: The most recently recorded duration for this timing row.
pipelineStages_col_meanShort: Mean duration across the rolling window.
pipelineStages_col_meanLong: Average time for this stage over recent samples.
pipelineStages_col_medianLong: Middle value of sample durations; robust to spikes.
pipelineStages_col_stdDevShort: Spread of durations; secondary shows coefficient of variation (CV%).
pipelineStages_col_stdDevLong: Standard deviation of timings; CV% compares variability to the mean.
pipelineStages_col_maxLong: Maximum observed duration in the window.
pipelineStages_col_minLong: Minimum observed duration in the window.
pipelineStages_filterNoneSelected: Turn on at least one category above to see pipeline stages.
pipelineStages_filterEmptyResult: No rows match the selected categories.
pipelineStages_filterEmptyResultText: No rows match the text filter.
pipelineStages_tableEmptyNoData: No timing samples yet. Connect cameras to see preview-path metrics.
pipelineStages_row_unknownLong: Duration sample for this pipeline stage. Refer to server and UI metric documentation for details.
pipelineStages_row_cam_jpeg_encode_msLon: Server-side JPEG compression for this camera preview frame.
pipelineStages_row_cam_jpeg_resize_msLon: Resize to display resolution before JPEG encode.
pipelineStages_row_cam_jpeg_rotate_msLon: Rotate preview image to match display orientation.
pipelineStages_row_mf_ws_payload_prepare: Total time for WebSocket payload assembly (JPEG encode all cameras + header/footer).
pipelineStages_row_mf_inter_camera_grab_: max(post_grab) − min(post_grab) across cameras in one frame (ms).
pipelineStages_row_cam_grab_request_to_s: Time from issuing a frame grab to the camera driver until grab succeeds.
pipelineStages_row_cam_retrieve_request_: Time from requesting frame retrieval until image data is available from the driver.
pipelineStages_row_cam_cap_prop_pos_minu: CAP_PROP_POS_MSEC minus host perf_counter immediately before grab; estimates camera vs host clock skew.
pipelineStages_row_cam_ws_payload_prepar: Legacy per-camera WebSocket payload assembly; newer builds report one multiframe row instead.
pipelineStages_row_cam_skeleton_detectio: Per-camera 2D skeleton detection on the aggregator path (local detector, not centralized GPU inference).
pipelineStages_row_cam_charuco_detection: Per-camera Charuco board corner detection for calibration and rigid-body tracking.
pipelineStages_row_skel_frame_readLong: Copy images from per-camera shared-memory ring buffers into the inference batch.
pipelineStages_row_skel_human_detection_: GPU preprocessing before the person-detection model (resize, normalize, tensor layout).
pipelineStages_row_skel_human_detectionL: Person-detection model forward pass (finds bounding boxes for pose estimation).
pipelineStages_row_skel_human_detection_: NMS and box selection after person detection.
pipelineStages_row_skel_pose_estimation_: Crop and resize person regions before the pose model.
pipelineStages_row_skel_pose_estimationL: Pose model forward pass (2D keypoints per detected person).
pipelineStages_row_skel_pose_estimation_: Decode keypoints and scores from pose model outputs.
pipelineStages_row_skel_predict_batchLon: Wall-clock time for the full predict_batch call across all cameras in the batch.
pipelineStages_row_skel_dropped_framesLo: Count of frame requests skipped because a newer frame arrived before inference started (not milliseconds).
pipelineStages_row_agg_capture_to_aggreg: Time from the earliest mid-grab timestamp across cameras until the aggregator begins processing that frame.
pipelineStages_row_agg_frame_collection_: Time from requesting a frame until all per-camera outputs for that frame have arrived.
pipelineStages_row_agg_skeleton_triangul: Multi-view triangulation of skeleton keypoints into 3D.
pipelineStages_row_agg_charuco_triangula: Multi-view triangulation of Charuco board corners.
pipelineStages_row_agg_keypoint_filterLo: Spatial and temporal filtering on triangulated keypoints.
pipelineStages_row_agg_velocity_gateLong: Reject keypoints whose motion exceeds a velocity threshold.
pipelineStages_row_agg_skeleton_filterLo: Bone-length and skeleton constraint filtering (dewiggler) on 3D keypoints.
pipelineStages_row_agg_full_frame_proces: Total aggregator work for one frame: triangulation, filtering, and related processing.
pipelineStages_row_agg_loop_timeLong: Wall time between successive aggregator loop iterations.
pipelineStages_row_ui_raf_body_before_de: Main-thread work in the same animation frame before multiplex JPEG decode is queued (acks, JSON, keypoints, etc.).
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_decode_worker: Wall time inside the JPEG decode worker (parse + createImageBitmap), excluding postMessage bridging.
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_decode_main_w: Main-thread wait from posting decode until dispatchFrames: worker time plus structured clone and microtask scheduling.
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_decode_bridge: Approximate postMessage and main-thread slice: main wait minus worker-busy time.
pipelineStages_row_ui_main_dispatch_to_c: Main thread from entering dispatchFrames until this frame is posted to the canvas worker.
pipelineStages_row_ui_canvas_worker_rece: performance.now() delta from main postMessage to the canvas worker onmessage handler.
pipelineStages_row_ui_canvas_worker_raf_: Canvas worker: from frame received until the rAF callback begins painting this frame.
pipelineStages_row_ui_render_ack_deliver: Main thread: time from the worker posting renderAck until the window receives the message.
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_ack_to_receiv: Time from sending frameAcknowledgment until this multiplex JPEG payload was fully received (network + server).
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_ws_binary_int: Milliseconds since the previous multiplex JPEG binary arrived on this WebSocket (preview pacing).
pipelineStages_row_ui_jpeg_ws_dispatch_l: Main-thread delay between the browser MessageEvent timestamp and this handler running.
pipelineStages_row_ui_raf_to_rendered_ms: Main-thread time from the rAF tick that started decode to render ack after bitmaprenderer paint.
serverNotConnected: Connect to server to enable controls
